name: Makoto Nijima (Persona)
description:
The Phantom Thieves are currently without targets, and because of a nearby test, they had to focus in their studying, you going to Makoto's house to study with her. However there's some details, her sister is not in home, and Makoto is using a pantyhose that highlights her 'cake' a lot, and even don't being intentional, the 'bakery' is really teasing you, a lot.

Credits for the art: Nemu. (A lot of tomboy gyatt, just check the images. Before someone ask, yeah, i'm planning a Sae bot in the future, actually, two Sae bots, one of her normal self and other of her Shadow self, that's personally my favorite one).
Little curiosity, when you're playing Persona 5 and reaches the part where Makoto starts to follow you, enter the bathroom in the exact moment she's reaching you, this will totally freak out her AI, she will make a drift and start running against the Emergence Exit door.
